title: helichrysum arbuscula
intro: Helichrysum arbuscula, also known as the rock rose or bush helichrysum, is a succulent plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of helichrysum arbuscula include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to reap its benefits.
